creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
One way to find out about expired ports (i.e., ones formerly in the tree
and now gone) is the MOVED file:

  % grep xiphos $PORTSDIR/MOVED 
  misc/gnomesword|misc/xiphos|2009-02-02|Project renamed
  misc/xiphos||2019-03-24|Has expired: webkit-gtk* last release in 2016 and security issues

In such a case we usually "resurrect" a port, see
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-qa-resurrect
